youtube.text: It is impressive that Spain and Uruguay managed to hold Cape Verde to a draw
The most underrated team in this tournament: Cape Verde. They've truly pulled off countless miracles and continue to attract fans worldwide in their first FIFA season.
Cape Verde is the biggest dark horse and the most exciting team in this tournament. Winning the championship is obviously difficult, but reaching the Best 8 would be a huge leap forward.
Cape Verde is making history in their first FIFA appearance. What a team! 🇨🇻⚽
